Description: This property controls app-side configs for seat and WFH booking rules, checkin cutoff timings, permissions, eligibility settings, and feature configurations within the booking module.
This property controls mobile device authentication, SSO settings, session expiry rules, app security options, and related access configurations.
This property controls the FAB button menu in app.
This property controls user profile settings, address edit permissions, transport visibility options, profile validation, completion rules, and related display configurations within the application.

This property controls app-side employee shift future scheduling rules, edit/cancel permissions, adhoc and bulk scheduling options, multi-office support, transport integrations, notifications, indemnification rules, and related schedule feature configurations.
